title: Minefury Pixelmon
description: Consistent fixes and improvements for a smooth gameplay experience. Fast & hassle free support. And a whole lot more!
body:
MineFury Pixelmon Modpack

What you can expect 
• Catch, battle, train, and build your team over time 
• Multiplayer-friendly setup with curated mods and sensible defaults 
• Quality-of-life improvements to reduce friction and speed up gameplay 
• Performance-focused choices aimed at stability on a wide range of PCs

Getting started

Open the Files tab

Install and launch

Support When reporting an issue, include: • Pack version number • latest.log or crash report • How much RAM you allocated
